feed.title: Posts tagged with i: Ember Dart's Blog: Software, Mathematics, HamRadio, Music

entry.title: Who I really am (and a revamp)
entry.content:
Good evening.

I have recently decided to revisit my own identity.

Those of you who have been following me already probably know that I'm trans, but maybe not quite all of the details.

For a little while between 2014 and 2018, I went by "Kathie", since it stemmed from an addiction to coffee and I thought it would be quirky. Great reason to name yourself after something, right?

Later on during my deepest relationship, I was encouraged to think "perhaps I'm actually non-binary" and went by a different name for the next eight years.

This year, after much consideration, I thought "Ember" would be a nice name to go by, to keep the fire alive inside me, since after reconsidering my identity and name a couple of times, I believe that the identity "trans-fem" fits me better.

I have now revamped my websites and blogs, so if you see anything amiss, please let me know in the comment emailer.
